---
title: "Getting started with DPmixGPD"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting started with DPmixGPD}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

```r
library(DPmixGPD)
set.seed(1)

dat <- data.frame(
  y = rgamma(200, shape = 2, scale = 1),
  x = rnorm(200)
)

fit <- fit_mixgpd(
  y ~ x,
  data   = dat,
  kernel = "gamma",
  dp_rep = "stick_breaking",
  dp_ctrl = list(K = 5),
  mcmc   = list(n_iter = 2000, burn_in = 1000, chains = 2),
  alpha  = 0.05
)

print(fit)
summary(fit)

# Access MCMC draws
draws <- as_mcmc(fit)
plot(draws)

# Change significance level for intervals
fit2 <- fit_mixgpd(
  y ~ x,
  data   = dat,
  kernel = "gamma",
  dp_rep = "stick_breaking",
  dp_ctrl = list(K = 5),
  mcmc   = list(n_iter = 2000, burn_in = 1000, chains = 2),
  alpha  = 0.1
)

summary(fit2)
```

```r
# Pareto kernel example (response-only)
y <- 1 / runif(300)

fit_p <- fit_mixgpd_xy(
  Y      = y,
  X      = NULL,
  kernel = "pareto",
  dp_rep = "stick_breaking",
  dp_ctrl = list(K = 5),
  mcmc   = list(n_iter = 1500, burn_in = 500, chains = 1),
  alpha  = 0.05
)

print(fit_p)
summary(fit_p)
```
